name: Broiled Sage Chicken
recipeIngredient: 6 skinless boneless chicken breast halves (about 2 pounds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except chicken breast halves in a large glass or plastic dish.
2. Add chicken; turn to coat with marinade. Cover and refrigerate at least 3 hours.
3. Set oven control to broil. Spray broiler pan with nonstick cooking spray.
4. Place chicken in pan. Broil chicken with tops 5 to 7 inches from heat for 5 minutes, turning once.
5. Broil about 5 more minutes longer or until juices run clear.
